power_text: Both players reveal top 3 cards; higher total wins all 6 cards under their play pile.
Move your hand to discard pile, then draw the same number of cards.
Name a power; that power cannot be played until your next turn.
Shuffle your play pile into your draw deck, then move the same number of cards from draw deck to play pile.
Draw 3 cards, then place 2 cards from your hand under your draw deck.
At round end, if you did not go out, shuffle your hand into your draw deck instead of discarding.
